description: SN3 naming lint config (Alembic, ported from the SN2/SN1 shape). Codifies THIS repo's as-found dominants per SN0 user gate #1 (codify, do not redesign): lib modules are camelCase (toolkits/middleware), PascalCase (class/contract/model positions), or all-lowercase/kebab (the deliberate wire/contract module family SN0 §2 did not census as Alembic stragglers — their reclassification is a recorded SN6 observation, not this lint's job); snake_case and mixed-case-kebab are blocked everywhere in lib. lib/ui .tsx components are PascalCase-or-camel per the same alternation. bin entrypoints and scripts are kebab-case (packet rule); configs are kebab-case (default.json single-word allowed by the kebab pattern). test/ filenames are mixed as-found (PascalCase.test.ts and kebab.test.ts both live) and stay unscoped until an SN wave censuses them, mirroring the SN2 decision. Exceptions require {file, owner, reason}.

rules.label: lib modules are camelCase/PascalCase or kebab (no snake_case, no mixed-case kebab)
